programme.title: It Could Happen To You

programme.title: Kids Vs Monsters
programme.desc: The six richest people in the world each have one thing still dragging them down.. their intolerable kids. Luckily, there is a mysterious entity that is happy to help.

programme.title: Robo-Dog: Airborne
programme.desc: After getting lost and losing his memory, Rob-dog is adopted by another family. Tyler, his true owner, embarks on a city-wide search to find him.

programme.title: Triumph
programme.desc: Inspired by a real story, a determined high school senior strives to be a wrestler one last time despite having cerebral palsy.

programme.title: 53206: Milwaukee
programme.desc: A young and aspiring singer must choose whether to escape the crime ravaged city she grew up in, or stay on her quest to end the violence and rebuild her community.

programme.title: Things Fall Apart
programme.desc: Inspirational sports drama centering on a remarkable football talent who becomes a better person when his athletic career is suddenly jeopardized.

programme.title: Extinction
programme.desc: When an infection turns most of humanity into rabid zombies, two men and a 9-year-old girl must barricade themselves against their monstrous attackers.

programme.title: Message From The King

programme.title: Left For Dead
programme.desc: After a car wreck temporarily robs Leah (Chelsea Hobbs) of her memory right down to her own name, she must piece together the details of the accident as they slowly return to her.

programme.title: Mystery Girl
programme.desc: A man sends secret admirer emails to his crush but an email address mix up causes the notes to go to the woman's lovelorn coworker instead.

programme.title: Resident Evil

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: A case involving drug lords and murder in South Florida takes a personal turn for undercover detectives Sonny Crockett (Colin Farrell) and Ricardo Tubbs (Jamie Foxx).

programme.title: Connected
programme.desc: A young man growing up in a neighbourhood that is controlled by the Mafia. Despite the teachings of his family, he is tempted by the extravagant lifestyle of his friends.

programme.title: Robert Whitlow's The Trial
programme.desc: After a horrific death of his family, attorney McClain is on the verge of committing suicide, until he's assigned a capital punishment case that begins to transform his life.

programme.title: Love The Coopers
programme.desc: The intertwined stories of four generations of Coopers unfold right before the annual family reunion on Christmas Eve. Can they survive the most beautiful time of the year?

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Oscar winning director Steven Spielberg, brings Michael Crichton's novel to life in this ground breaking film about a dinosaur theme park that turns into a death trap.

programme.title: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: A boy haunted by visions of a dark tower from a parallel reality teams up with the tower's disillusioned guardian to stop an evil warlock known as the Man in Black.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Military lawyer Lieutenant Daniel Kaffee defends Marines accused of murder. They contend they were acting under orders.

programme.title: Identity Thief
programme.desc: Sandy Patterson has one week to hunt down the woman who has stolen his identity before his world implodes. Another superb comedy from Seth Gordon (Horrible Bosses).

programme.title: Hudson Hawk
programme.desc: A cat burglar is forced to steal Da Vinci works of art for a world domination plot.

programme.title: Undercover Brother
programme.desc: Silly slapstick comedy starring Eddie Griffin, as an undercover spy who must foil the plans of a man who wants to reduce the entire population into mindless zombies.

programme.title: Devil In A Blue Dress
programme.desc: In a world divided by black and white, Easy Rawlins is about to cross the line.

programme.title: The Taking Of Pelham 1 2 3
programme.desc: Armed men hijack a New York subway train in demand of a hefty ransom. As the authorities try to negotiate with the hostage takers they wonder how the hijackers plan to get away.

programme.title: Tony Robinson's Marvellous Machines
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Tony Robinson explores machines that help us mere mortals become superhuman. From a tree-chopping-device faster than twenty lumberjacks, to a jet-powered suit that could be worn by flying paramedics.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S11/E16 - Summer Camp'. The warm season provides for Alaskans.

programme.title: Britain's Most Beautiful Road
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. We meet entrepreneurs Shona and Lewis who've given up their jobs for their passion.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Deserts and Grasslands'. David Attenborough explores earth's greatest wildernesses, where extraordinary life survives in unexpected ways, and nature puts on its most dramatic show.

programme.title: Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany H...
programme.desc: 'Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany Hughes. S1/E4 - Crete: Chania, Knossos and Eleutherna'. Arriving just as a sea storm hits, Bettany is lucky to reach Crete. She travels to the ruins of the ancient city of Knossos.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Northern Outer Hebrides'. Ben Fogle returns to Taransay, the island where, over 20 years ago, he took part in the TV show Castaway.

programme.title: Tony Robinson's Marvellous Machines
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Tony Robinson explores machines that help us mere mortals become superhuman. From a tree-chopping-device faster than twenty lumberjacks, to a jet-powered suit that could be worn by flying paramedics.

programme.title: Deadly Mission Shark
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Shark Saviours'. Steve Backshall is on a mission to create a new generation of shark saviours, but first he needs to find his team. Steve takes 12 young UK hopefuls to boot camp.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E11 - Supertanker Europe'. In this episode, the world's biggest oil tanker - the mighty Supertanker Europe of the record breaking TI Class of ship.

programme.title: Life Below Zero

programme.desc: 'S19/E24 - Small Town, Big Picking'. A Pennsylvania preservationist opens the doors to his jaw-dropping historic properties. And the Wolfe brothers sift through a rockstar picker's off-limits collection.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: 'S19/E25 - Corvette Me Not'. It's a scavenger hunt for Mike as he excavates a barn-fresh classic Corvette. Meanwhile, Robbie and Jersey sift through 150 years of history on a Michigan family farm.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: 'S19/E26 - $135,000 Pick'. A late collector's home features a stockpile of awesome wheels. Mike gives a six-figure offer the largest in American Pickers history to take home five rare motorbikes.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: 'S19/E27 - Junkyard Jewels'. Robbie and Jersey comb through a homewrecker's massive cache of architectural salvage, and Mike is determined to rescue a trio of dented Porsches.

programme.desc: 'S1/E4 of 8 - Conquering The Wall'. Six men, led by the mastermind, Nuno Pontes, escaped Pittsburgh State Penitentiary by tunnelling to freedom under the massive wall of the prison. They made it as far as Texas before being caught.

programme.title: Britain's Secret Islands

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Living A Nightmare
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The Good Doctor'. A wealthy psychiatrist and his son are shot dead. Investigators suspect a robbery until they realise that only a gun and a car are missing.

programme.title: Living A Nightmare
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - A Son's Last Kiss'. A 28-year-old man breaks up with his lover and disappears soon after. As the police search for him, a paper trail of suspicious text messages come to light.

programme.title: Murder Comes To Town
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Cowboys From Hell'. When Diana and Jose are found murdered, three letters scrawled across Algar's living room wall become the central clue in a nationwide manhunt.

programme.title: Murder In The Heartland
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Groomed For Murder'. Tourist town Traverse City, Michigan, is turned upside down when 18-year-old Kalee Bruce is bludgeoned to death at her workplace.

programme.title: Murder In The Heartland
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Invitation To Be Killed'. Locals stay quiet to protect their own when a new resident of Hartford, Kentucky, is found tied up and floating in a toolbox in a creek. What happened?

programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - The Copycat Killer'. When rising star Rebecca Schaeffer is murdered, Hollywood panics. Detectives investigate who killed the beloved actress, and if a copycat killer is on the loose.

programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Phantom Killer Of The Opera'. 31-year-old violinist Helen Mintiks is found murdered in an airshaft at the Metropolitan Opera House. Could there be a real life Phantom of the Opera?

programme.title: A Crime To Remember
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Paradise Lost'. When the young wife of a Naval Lieutenant is found beaten by the side of the road in Honolulu in 1931, the repercussions lead to murder and a sensational trial.

programme.title: A Crime To Remember
programme.desc: 'S4/E6 - Guess Who?'. When a wealthy man is found shot dead in his home and his wife locked in a closet, detectives find themselves a crime where all is not as it seems.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Blood Creek'. A teenager found dead on high school grounds panics a Kentucky town. Investigators find a wall of lies and false confessions that cross state lines.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Dead Before Sunrise'. Greenup, Kentucky, hasn't seen a homicide for decades, let alone one with ritualistic signs. Detectives find themselves in pursuit of a mysterious biker.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: 'S6/E7 - He's Back'. When Natalie moves to Norfolk, Virginia, she makes new friends both on and off her high school dance squad. But she's unaware a violent obsession revolves around her.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: 'S9/E10 - Success At Any Cost'. Richard wants to have the good life by any means possible. When bad choices lead to a prison sentence, he makes a deadly decision, and his secret is exposed.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows Of Death
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - The Night He Turned Bad'. In 1974, 17-year-old Carla Walker is kidnapped. For 45 years the case goes unsolved, and no one knows that the person responsible is hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Married With Secrets
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - The Man With Two Faces'. Sergeant Jeff Pelo is a respected police officer. When he's caught trespassing at night on a woman's property, his spotless reputation comes under fire.

programme.title: Shattered
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Box'. In 1996, a Texas dad seeks revenge for his son's mutilation. A Mississippi teen tries to escape a footlocker she was imprisoned in. A detective has a career-defining case.

programme.title: The Importer
programme.desc: Okwu is an okirika seller who lies about importing his goods from India, little did the villagers know that the secret of his business is withing the village.

programme.title: Juventus Pot Of Money
programme.desc: Juventus Pot of Money always feels that he can get whatever he wants because of his wealth, but his nemesis catches up with him when he tries to summon his wife for a kill.

programme.title: Beyond Karma
programme.desc: A story about two brothers who get themselves in trouble in a rape case and whose punishment is banishment. Will they come out of it clean?

programme.title: Olaedo
programme.desc: Olaedo is destined to dine with the high and mighty, finding her way to the royal home may be a way to fulfill her destiny.

programme.title: Mpat Enin
programme.desc: After a kings death, Nsongurua comes to the palace with her son and her family to claim his right to the throne but he wasn't accepted.

programme.title: Akabo
programme.desc: A young man is faced with mystic spiritual torment, he tries to run from his loved ones in order not to give room for powers beyond his control.

programme.title: Jealous Brothers
programme.desc: Francis did not trust his brother, so he accused him of stealing his money at his wedding. Little did he know that Mark is going to be his savior.

programme.title: Village Bandit
programme.desc: A group of bandits with innocent faces terrorizes a village, but all goes south when one of them mistakenly shoots his nephew.

programme.title: Beyond Forgiveness
programme.desc: After Obinna lost is ability to get a woman pregnant, he banks on faith and fate, but he is not ready to believe his wife when the time comes.

programme.title: 15 Seconds
programme.desc: A lady's husband does not satisfy her in bed, she tried all she could to get back to her ex. Little did she know that he was in love with her best friend.

programme.title: Kasi Car Culture
programme.desc: 'S9/E4'. Sbu heads out to BMW Campfest and shows us the best beemers in SA, while Zee and the MD of VWSA head to Soweto in her Golf 8 GTI.

programme.title: IGNITION GT
programme.desc: 'S24/E10'. Ziphorah drives the formidable BMW X6M Competition. Volvo shakes things up in the local EV market with the EX30 and we bid a fond farewell to the Renault Megane R.S. 300.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: 'S3/E6'. Derek auctions off some vehicles that were used in the TV show Heartbeat. There's love for an Austin Cambridge and sporty Italian number finds a new home.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: 'S24/E10'. We check out the new Aston Martin Vantage, two-wheel fun, courtesy of Aprillia and Audi's latest Super Saloon. Mini takes on Lexus in a battle of posh crossovers.

programme.title: Rev
programme.desc: 'S24/E10'. Cars and long-haul trucks operated by remote control. And an Indian transgender woman's life turned around by the donation of an electric rickshaw.

programme.title: Hankook 24H Series
programme.desc: 'S2/E7'. It's the season's last race in Kuwait, it also marks the start of 2024. We have had six breath-taking races this year and now it´s time to close the motorsport season condignly.

programme.title: The Guild Garage
programme.desc: 'S3/E10'. Dave is in Italy where he gets an exclusive look at the SCG003 hyper-car. Meanwhile, Ron and Larry troubleshoot an oil issue on a 1966 Shelby.

programme.title: Sold In 60 Seconds
programme.desc: 'S2/E1'. Sold in 60 seconds is a new auction show, featuring some of the rarest, most valuable collectible vehicles in South Africa. We look at the star lots and the bidding wars unfold.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: 'S3/E7'. A rare Honda S800 sports car from 1967 takes Derek's fancy, and a couple of very different Ford Capris with long histories go head-to-head at the auction.

programme.title: Outback Car Hunters
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 of 10'. The guys dig deep to unearth a rare 1958 Land Rover Series 1 in a shed full of junk. Then, they transform a 1972 Mazda Bongo van into a micro-home for millennials to live in.

programme.title: Icons of Auto
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. An engineering duo launches a powerhouse family business that is transforming the automotive industry.

programme.title: ALL THINGS MOTORING INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: 'S6/E7'. Mike talks to the lead auctioneer of Creative rides about their collection of some of the finest cars in South Africa, and we head to Timour Hall to check out classic cars.

programme.title: The Bike Show
programme.desc: 'S24/E11'. 3 big secondhand bikes that feel as good as new on this week's Bike Show, news from Dunlop and Scorpion helmets in South Africa and details of two new road models from Husqvarna.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: 'S7/E5'. Car builder Ian Roussel challenges his unique fabrication with projects to create custom one-of-a-kind vehicles for his clients.

programme.title: Kasi Car Culture
programme.desc: 'S9/E5'. We cover all that you missed out on at this year's SA Campfest down in Warmbaths, and head to the coast for a modified VW Polo.

programme.title: IGNITION GT
programme.desc: 'S24/E11'. We transport some four-legged passengers in the Mercedes-Benz EQE SUV. The Fiat Strada reasserts itself in the half-tonne bakkie segment and Juliet drives the ORA 400 GT.

programme.title: Overhaulin'

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: 'S24/E11'. We're checking out a bargain crossover from Volvo, we also look at the 8th generation BMW 5 series, Skoda squares up to Vauxhall and a manual super saloon from Cadilac.

programme.title: Rev

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Workshop
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Some of the precious classic cars and motorbikes go to auction with no reserve. Meanwhile, Neil and Anthony get to work on a mystery vehicle from the 1930s.

programme.title: Suicide Squad
programme.desc: Sometimes the world needs to fight evil with evil. Will Smith and an all-star cast make up a team of villains brought together to take on a suicide mission to save the Earth.

programme.title: The Asian Connection
programme.desc: Revenge and money run this Steven Seagal action film. A duo unwittingly steal money from the Asian mob, but when one of them is killed, the other declares war on the gang.

programme.title: Pig
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage propels this exciting thriller. A truffle hunter living alone in the Oregon wilderness returns to Portland to find his kidnapped pig.

programme.title: Before I Fall
programme.desc: An intriguing drama based on Lauren Oliver's best-seller. A privileged young woman keeps reliving her last day over and over as she tries to unearth the mystery behind her death.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: The Vows...
programme.desc: 'Signed, Sealed, Delivered: The Vows We Have Made'. Shane and Oliver try to help an ill boy reunite with a long-lost pal ahead of their wedding in this instalment.

programme.title: Squeaky Clean Mysteries: Hazardous...
programme.desc: 'Squeaky Clean Mysteries: Hazardous Duty'. A gripping mystery thriller. A crime scene cleaner uncovers a murder weapon that the police overlooked and realises the wrong person is in jail.

programme.title: Interstellar
programme.desc: Matthew McConaughey and Anne Hathaway take centre stage in this Christopher Nolan sci-fi about a group of astronauts who go on a mission to save humanity from a dying earth.

programme.title: River Wild

programme.title: Eraser: Reborn

programme.title: Catwoman

programme.title: Ride Along

programme.title: Uncharted

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Tom Cruise is explosive in this epic spy reboot. When his team is killed on a mission, an agent becomes the main suspect. He sets out to find out the truth and clear his name.

programme.title: Manifest West
programme.desc: A compelling coming-of-age story told from the view of a young girl whose family spirals out of control after they decide to live off the grid to escape the pressures of city life.

programme.title: Deadland
programme.desc: A captivating Western thriller. US border patrol agent Angel Waters makes a routine apprehension, but it soon spirals into his worst nightmare.

programme.title: The Wedding Dress
programme.desc: An uptight businesswoman is forced to reevaluate her life's priorities when her younger sister gets engaged.

programme.title: Ubaba Wase Next Door
programme.desc: Mlungisi's life is turned upside down when he finds out the daughter he abandoned is the neighbour's new housekeeper.

programme.title: Ke Kopa Le Divorceng
programme.desc: A married couple has reached breaking point in their marriage with the constant arguing, not seeing eye to eye, and blaming each other for their failed marriage.

programme.title: Umhlukanisi
programme.desc: After seven years of marriage, a domestic worker finds herself falling in love with her boss. Her husband finds out and manipulates her to rob the family she works for.

programme.title: Inkwekwezi
programme.desc: An ambitious athlete does everything in her power to impress her sports devotee father. Her world changes when she loses him suddenly.

programme.title: Ngeculo
programme.desc: Thandi Makhanya arrives in Johannesburg in search of her songstress sister. She meets a DriveMe driver, Malusi, who wants to help her find her sister.

programme.title: Thula Thula
programme.desc: A group of friends are on a road trip. While passing a small town, they realise they've run out of petrol. They stop at a petrol station but there's no one in sight.

programme.title: Abo Makoti
programme.desc: An honest and dedicated mama's boy finds his morals and values compromised when his mother puts pressure on him to take a wife and settle down.

programme.title: Uthandolusha
programme.desc: After a terrible car accident, a young couple struggles to rekindle their love as their lives take different directions, leaving them both torn and tormented.

programme.title: Boshego
programme.desc: After befriending a drug kingpin's nephew, a determined undercover cop takes it upon himself to save the young man from a life of crime.

programme.title: Umhlolokazi
programme.desc: When Ntombikayise loses her husband, she discovers that he has a whole other life that he and his family have kept hidden from her for years.

programme.title: Umndeni Empini
programme.desc: When a father with cancer has a couple of weeks to live, two brothers fight for the title of sole heir to his company, but their greed gets in the way.

programme.title: Inhlanhla
programme.desc: When an Uber driver finds a bag that was left by a woman who caught his attention, he embarks on a series of misadventures as he desperately tries to return it to her.

programme.title: Nomvula 2
programme.desc: When a married woman runs away from a possessive husband into the arms of a former lover, the unexpected happens.

programme.title: Isinamuva
programme.desc: A father's dying wish is for his son to marry his friend's daughter. However, a long-buried family secret creeps up to the surface, revealing true intentions.

programme.title: Ho Kena Ho Eona
programme.desc: After Dineo gets retrenched and evicted, she moves into her boyfriend's place with her daughter. Things take a turn for the worse when a force from inside starts haunting them.

programme.title: Amagugu
programme.desc: After Bongiwe's grandmother dies she inherits the family house. Through a series of elaborate and hilarious plots her disgruntled mother, aunt and uncle scheme to take the house from her.

programme.title: Lokshin Bioskop: Mamoruti
programme.desc: A rebellious young girl is failing at school and her partying is getting out of hand. Her frustrated parents decide to teach her a lesson.

programme.title: Dangerous
programme.desc: Scott Eastwood leads a star cast in this action thriller. A reformed sociopath breaks his parole to uncover the truth about his brother's death, only to get mired in his business.

programme.title: Richard Says Goodbye
programme.desc: Johnny Depp stars as a college professor who rejects doctors' advice and throws caution to the wind after being diagnosed with a terminal illness.

programme.title: #FBF
programme.desc: A fun comedy drama. After accidentally taking her mom's laptop, Annie poses as her mom for the day and tries to repair her parents' marriage.

programme.title: Poseidon

programme.title: Gravity
programme.desc: The suspense and tension are unending in this multiple Oscar-winning drama. When disaster strikes, an astronaut and engineer are stranded in space.

programme.title: B.A.P.S

programme.title: Mr. Birthday

programme.title: The Elfkins Baking A Difference
programme.desc: A cheerful animation based on a German fable. When three Elfkins leave their underground world to explore the human world, they end up helping a struggling baker save his shop.

programme.title: Easterland
programme.desc: A fun adventure animation. When Bad Clyde casts an evil spell that exiles Benny the Easter Bunny and threatens to ruin Easter, Santa and his reindeer sidekick must save the day.

programme.title: Juwanna Mann

programme.title: The Grinch

programme.title: Jurassic Park

programme.desc: 'S3/E78 - Perry the Actorpus, Bullseye!'. When Perry wins a contest and becomes the spokesanimal for Totally Tools, his secret identity is put in jeopardy.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E79 - The Curse of Candace, That's the Spirit!'. Michael Douglas and son Dylan star in this Halloween episode where Phineas and Ferb are enlisted to help a boy rid his house of ghosts.

programme.title: Walk The Prank
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Fish You Were Here'. Bailey is upset when she is the only one of her classmates not invited to a birthday party.

programme.title: Walk The Prank
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Crushed'. Chance flirts with a girl via text message, but after she flakes on him, he starts to believe that Bailey is pranking him.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E73 - The Puppeteer 2'. Ladybug and Cat Noir must face the Puppeteer again at the Musee Grevin! Our heroes will need to put on a show to stop her.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S6/E121 - You've Got Sale'. The Baxters host a garage sale and try to one-up their neighbors. Alice sells her Tasha doll only to regret the decision, and Booker stresses over his college choice.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S6/E122 - Gown to the Wire'. Raven gets the opportunity to take her fashion designs global, Booker may not be able to walk at graduation, Victor has big news, and Alice gets a surprise call from an old friend.

programme.title: Walk The Prank
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - A Moving Situation'. Chance and Herman learn that their father is up for a big promotion, and they might have to move to a different city if he gets the job.

programme.title: Walk The Prank
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - School Clubbing'. The gang signs up for after school clubs. Bailey joins the Friends of Animals, Dusty the TV Club, Herman the Wrestling Club and Chance the Journalism Club.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E74 - Phineas and Ferb Interrupted, A Real Boy'. Candace is thrilled when Mum wants to spend the day with her as it gives her a chance to bust the boys - at last!

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E75 - Mommy Can You Hear Me?, Road Trip'. Candace is in bed with an injured ankle, so the boys help stop her getting bored - and she unwittingly saves their cosmonaut friend from an approaching obstacle.

programme.title: Vikingskool
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. When preparations for the arrival of the Kingsmoot at Viking Skool are disrupted by bickering between the Trio and Doomhild, Sinew sets an unusual punishment.

programme.title: Vikingskool
programme.desc: 'S1/E10'. Arni discovers a tiny Pebble Troll and sees it as a chance to learn more about this magical race but his thirst for knowledge puts him at odds with Erik and Ylva who want him to get rid of the little monster.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E74 - Phineas and Ferb Interrupted, A Real Boy'. Candace is thrilled when Mum wants to spend the day with her as it gives her a chance to bust the boys - at last!

programme.title: Descendants Wicked World
programme.desc: 'S2/E26 - Evil Among Us'. The Jewel-bilee is here, but so is Auradon's newest VK, Zevon!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E89 - Guiltrip'. When Reflekta locks herself into a bottomless abyss of guilt, Ladybug calls on an ally with unfailing optimism.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E90 - Crocoduel'. Because of a plan thought up by Marinette, Shadow Moth akumatizes two villains. Ladybug and Cat Noir will need help to stop the evil duo.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Getting the Band (shell) Together/The Greatest Concert Ever'. Molly raises money to rebuild the old Brighton Bandshell and bring the town together.

programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Mama's Gotta Hustle/Hooray for Mollywood!'. When the McGees are tight on cash, Mom turns to an app called Gig-Pig. Molly learns mo' money means mo' problems when she and Andrea team up to make a scary movie.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S4/E113 - Thanks But No Thanks, Troy Story'. Top chef Gordon Ramsay and actress Goldie Hawn guest star in this show in which Carl bribes Monty into helping him to get some much needed acknowledgement from Monogram.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S4/E114 - What is Love?, One Good Turn'. Mom asks Phineas and Ferb to help organise a party. Inspired by a movie with a strong heroine, Candace and Stacy enter Phineas and Ferb's Ultimate Obstacle Course.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S4/E115 - Cheers for Fears/Just Our Luck'. Candace reluctantly asks Phineas and Ferb's help to create the ride of Jeremy's life for his birthday. Doof has a lucky day thanks to his Good Luckinator.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 'S6/E10 - Tradition Dies Hard'. The team investigate a mansion that was converted into a museum at the request of a dying matriarch. Now, her family's spirits are rumoured to haunt the museum.

programme.title: Fright Club
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Spies In The Sky'. Comedy legend Tommy Davidson sheds light on footage of a goblin strutting down a dark driveway. Plus, a bizarre clip shows a ghost that believes it's a ninja.

programme.title: Conjuring Kesha
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - A Terrifying Truth'. Kesha and rapper GaTa check in for a night of terror at the Westerfeld House. Is illusionist Harry Houdini responsible for the electrifying paranormal activity?

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - Zombie Boy'. Amy, Adam and Chip investigate claims of threatening paranormal activity at a historic estate in Massachusetts. The team are shocked by what they discover.

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - No Surrender'. Neil defies both nature and locals by developing his mine tour. But when the town discovers his secret construction project, McCarthy draws a line in the sand.

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Frost and Found'. Jeremy and his sons search the frozen wilderness for a lost bulldozer. Mark sets out to show his new fiancée the beauty of McCarthy, but finds danger.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: 'S105/E2 - On the Fast Track in Lisbon'. A couple, who want a baby, have searched 16 cities around the world for their dream house. Now, they've decided Lisbon, Portugal, will be their new home.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: 'S105/E6 - Sync or Swim in Perth'. A Canadian synchronized swimmer is training for the Australian Olympic team. She needs a property that is close to her training pool, but also near family.

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Treasure Map From Space'. Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos dives the waters of Campeche, Mexico in search of shipwrecks first located by astronaut Gordon Cooper from space in 1963.

programme.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - A Steep Price'. A discovery on the island fires up the team. But as excitement builds, a series of dangerous encounters threatens to end the mission - and people's lives.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Canadian Bigfoot, Eh?'. The Bigfoot researchers head to the Canadian Rockies to investigate a unique Bigfoot encounter caught on tape. Can they track down this territorial Sasquatch?

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Crossing Thin Ice'. When Jeremy crosses a frozen river in a two-ton bulldozer, he finds himself on thin ice. Jenny takes on a dangerous survival mission with her new-born baby.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S13/E12 - Godspeed John Glenn, Canine Convict and Brace for Landing'. Don Wildman examines a dangerous mission into outer space. Plus, the story of a pilot's heroic plan during an emergency over the Pacific.

programme.title: Rebel Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Confederate'. The search for lost rebel gold continues at the last stop on Jefferson Davis's money train. Larry follows the direct route of Jefferson Davis.

programme.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Opposite Of Paradise'. The team gear up for their first venture onto the Snake Island, where they'll face triple-digit heat and one of the world's deadliest vipers.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Baby Bigfoot'. The research team visit New York to investigate video footage of a baby Bigfoot. Will a new search method help them to locate Sasquatches living near the Big Apple?

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Mother Ship'. An amateur photographer captures floating orbs on camera. UFOs seemingly circle a larger, egg-shaped mother ship floating high above Anchorage.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Amelia Earhart'. Josh Gates hunts down new evidence on the disappearance of Amelia Earhart. He starts in Papua New Guinea, ending his journey in Fiji, hoping to find her remains.

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Dead Silence'. Darrell seeks clues from Cooper's past. His widow reveals many secrets, but a former NASA flight director won't say a word. A big piece is missing in Darrell's mission.

programme.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Dire Consequences'. As injuries pile up, the team push deeper into the Island in search of the Treasure of the Trinity, but a trail of clues leads to confrontation.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Big Rhody'. The team travel to Rhode Island to examine video of a roadside sighting of a Bigfoot. Could this small state turn out to be a prime location for Sasquatch activity?

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Uprooted'. After being devastated by a powerful windstorm, it's all hands on deck as the town recovers. Mark must clear dangerously damaged trees before it's too late.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S13/E13 - Legally Haunted, Demise of the Dodo and Jersey Kaboom'. Don Wildman examines a mysterious explosion at a munitions factor during World War One. Plus, the story of a house that supposedly comes with three ghosts.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Above And Far Beyond'. A legendary beast attacks a cabin on the Aleutian Islands. A UFO pursues a woman as she drives through an extra-terrestrial hot spot.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - City of Gold'. Josh treks the Inca Trail through the Andes and into the Peruvian Amazon in search of a mythical city of gold. His journey takes a detour to the ruins of Machu Picchu.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 'S5/E7 - Fright Train'. The team are in New Hampshire to investigate a Victorian inn. The owner claims to have seen a ghostly woman, while other visitors have reported strange apparitions.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - Aliens Vs. Stalin At Area 51'. Experts investigate whether the Roswell UFO incident was a Soviet conspiracy masterminded by Stalin, or is the story just another cover-up?

programme.title: The Dead Files

programme.title: Ghost Nation
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Squire Street Haunting'. Jason Hawes' daughter, Satori, calls on the team to help on a case she can't crack in Franklin, Massachusetts. What will they discover?

programme.title: Platteland Toe

programme.title: Trou, Trek of Toer?

programme.title: Outopsie

programme.title: Nisboere

programme.title: Huisgenoot: Ware Lewensdramas
programme.desc: 'S12/E3'. 'Iewers moet mens tog tot jou sinne kom...' Dit is die gevoel van die regter na die afskuwelike aanval en moord op Natasha Barnard een aand na 'n rusie in 'n kroeg wat geweldadig geraak het.

programme.title: Die Groot Afskud
programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. Ses weke vandat ons spanne begin het om hul lewens te verander, maar dit kan lank voel as jy van droë hoenderborsie tot droë hoenderborsie lewe. Minette, ons dieëtkundige, wys dat gesond eet lekker kan wees.

programme.title: Nisboere
programme.desc: 'S8/E5'. Nisboere vind uit hoe Whistler Rum in die Vrystaat gemaak word. Plus, karnivoriese plante as troeteldiere... of is dit nou troetelplante? Nisboere gesels met die kenners. Ons wys jou Laeveld Agrochem se nuwe bemarkingsveldtog.

programme.title: Hart van die huis met Universal...
programme.desc: 'Hart van die huis met Universal Kitchens'. Ons volg Minki van der Westhuizen se reis om haar kombuis, met die hulp van Universal Kitchens, te omskep.

programme.title: Landbouweekliks
programme.desc: 'S24/E3'. Graeme Jarvie boer naby Greytown, KZN met aartappels en mielies. Sy produksiegleuf vir die beste markpryse word haarfyn bestuur. Hy het ook 'n toepassing ontwikkel waardeur varsprodukte direk bemark kan word.

programme.title: My Plek Of Joune?
programme.desc: 'S10/E2'. Anchen en Gerrit sit vas oor 'n sitkamer met te veel kinderspeelgoed en te min dekor. Kan Isabel en Melt met R15 000 en binne een dag stylvrede skep?

programme.title: Nisboere
programme.desc: 'S8/E6'. Nisboere ontdek 'n juweel van 'n neutboerdery by Prieska waar pimper-, amandel- en pekanneute verbou word. By Digby Upington ontdek ons 'n kameelmelkplaas. Plus, ons vind meer uit oor heuningboerdery in die Kaap.

programme.title: Slimkoppe met Netwerk24
programme.desc: 'S2/E4'. Die Slimkoppe kuier saam in die spreekwoordelike motorhuis van kennis en gesels oor tegnologie. Alles van Robotmaats en blou-tande tot Microsoft en 'n Mir-dompeltuig.

programme.title: Huisgenoot: Ware Lewensdramas

programme.title: Sterkbek

programme.title: Kom Ons Braai

programme.title: Tuin en Spens
programme.desc: In hierdie dokumentêr deel die kunstenaar en skrywer, Louis Jansen van Vuuren, hoe jy 'n vegan-leefstyl maklik en lekker kan aanpak.

programme.title: My Plek Of Joune?
